ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., Pt_meta) */,
  "state" TEXT /* Processing state of the dataset (e.g., mRCC) */,
  "pt_pdx" TEXT /* Patient identifier */,
  "reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads for the dataset */,
  "gsm" TEXT /* GSM identifier */,
  "srx" TEXT /* SRX identifier for the sequencing run */,
  "srr" TEXT /* SRR identifier for the submission */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the dataset belongs */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current version of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public database, internal lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_principal_investigator FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* Reference to the dataset the sample belongs to */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue from which the sample was derived */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient from whom the sample was derived */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., blood, tissue) */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the sample is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sequencing run */,
  "srx" TEXT /* SRX identifier associated with the run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the sequencing run was performed */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for the sequencing (e.g., Illumina) */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the sequencing run (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the run */,
  "quality_control_passed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the run passed quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_runs_srx FOREIGN KEY ("srx") REFERENCES datasets ("srx")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission record */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher with the permission */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset for which access is granted */,
  "can_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the researcher can access the dataset */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version of the dataset was released */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality metric record */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality metric (e.g., read depth) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the error record */,
  "dataset_id" TEXT /* ID of the dataset where the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Description of the error message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was logged */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the error has been resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who resolved the error */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
